regulatory_narrative: The AI-related failure rate for product code QIH has increased from 38% in the baseline period to 72% in the most recent period, a rise of 34 percentage points over the 90-day window. This upward trend is statistically significant (Mann-Kendall p=0.01, tau=0.62) and warrants immediate attention. Signal monitoring should be escalated and a formal CAPA review initiated.
recommended_action: Escalate to CAPA review; notify device manufacturer within 30 days per 21 CFR 803.

regulatory_narrative: Report volume for product code MYH has remained stable over the 60-day observation window, averaging 4.2 reports per week with no discernible directional trend. The Mann-Kendall test did not reach statistical significance (p=0.42, tau=0.08). No escalation is required at this time; continue routine monthly monitoring.
recommended_action: Continue routine monthly monitoring; no immediate action required.
